name: jobscout
description: Guided job search and ranking against the live Job Scout catalog.

interface.shortDescription: Find jobs matched to your profile.
interface.longDescription: Builds a private local candidate profile, searches the live read-only Job Scout catalog, and ranks realistic offers.
